name: 2D - Customer Support with Hybrid Search + Escalation

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vectors: [{ id: $json.ticketId, values: $('Embed Query').first().json.embedding, metadata: { ticket_id: $json.ticketId, customer_id: $json.customerId, query: $json.query, confidence: $json.confidence, priority: $json.escalationPayload.priority, reason: $json.escalationPayload.reason, status: 'open', created_at: $json.escalationPayload.created_at, top_candidates: JSON.stringify($json.escalationPayload.top_candidates) } }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const escalateData = $('Escalate to Human').first().json;

return [{ json: { success: true, status: 'escalated', customer_id: escalateData.customerId, query: escalateData.query, ticket_id: escalateData.ticketId, message: "We couldn't find a confident answer to your question. A support agent has been notified and will respond within 2 business hours.", metadata: { confidence: escalateData.confidence, threshold: 0.45, priority: escalateData.escalationPayload.priority, top_candidates: escalateData.escalationPayload.top_candidates } } }];
